windows.old_description: Assembling the dessert candles - cones, whipped topping, sprinkles, chocolate sticks.
windows.embed_text_v2: Showcasing finished dessert candles, pink and white whipped wax frosting tops, decorative wax Christmas trees bows chocolate bars candy, in white tins and clear glass cups, holiday display
windows.summary_v2: Slow beauty-pan across a tabletop of finished pink-and-white dessert-style decorative candles in tins and glass cups with Christmas styling.

tags_v2.setting: styled tabletop with pine and ribbon Christmas decor

seconds_v2.desc: Black frame, no image yet (clip start).

Close-up showcase of finished dessert-style soy candles in white tins and clear glass cups, topped with pink and white whipped-wax frosting and decorative wax pieces shaped like Christmas trees, bows, candy and a red chocolate bar.
Camera holds on a clear glass cup whose white wax surface holds two pink wax cone 'trees' with a tied wick; a faint 'dream studio co.' watermark sits over the center; pink-frosted candles flank it.
Slight pan across the same finished pink-and-white decorated candles in tins and glasses; piped frosting, macaron and ribbon wax embellishments are visible, with the dream watermark centered.
Lower angle pans to candles with thick white whipped-wax tops and pink wax trees, bows and chocolate-bar pieces; a red ribbon and pine sprig decor sit in the background.
Continued slow pan over glass-cup candles with creamy white frosting layers and pink wax tree/ornament toppers, finished products arranged on a white surface.
Pan settles on a central glass candle with white piped frosting and pink textured wax trees; surrounding candles show pink candy and bow wax decorations.
Camera moves over candles topped with pink and white wax 'whipped cream', wrapped gifts and bow shapes; red ribbon and fairy lights blur in the background.
Final close-up of a white tin candle piled with pink and white wax dollops and a bow, beside a pink waffle-cone wax piece, all finished decorative candles with Christmas styling.
